title: diosma glabra
intro: Diosma glabra, also known as the Cape starflower or Cape bush, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Diosma glabra include relief from coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Diosma glabra is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
